creator: _@r4k.net
text:
This is not really a problem but more of a feature add-on
	It is a port of ipsec for ipv4 as it is implemented in
	OpenBSD to FreeBSD including the required userland programs.
	I just specified kern as the category now.
	
	I attached a file containing the patches and additional files
	including a readme on where the stuff is supposed to go.

	If there're any questions please contact me.
